metadata.description: Name of the resource group to create.

Azure region. Recommended (verified Mistral + DataZoneStandard SKUs): germanywestcentral, switzerlandnorth, swedencentral. Any other Azure region also works as long as your chosen llmProfile models are available there.
Unique suffix for globally unique names (lowercase, 3-8 chars).
Node.js runtime version.

LLM profile. aoai-eu = gpt-5.4 (DataZone) + gpt-4.1-mini (DataZone) — recommended default. aoai-eu-cost = gpt-5.4 (DataZone) + gpt-5.4-mini (Global). mistral-eu = Mistral-Large-3 (DataZone) only, single model for both roles. mistral-eu-cost = Mistral-Large-3 (DataZone) + mistral-small-2503 (Global).
TPM capacity (thousands tokens/min) for the reasoning deployment.
TPM capacity for the fast deployment.
Reasoning effort for the reasoning role (AOAI reasoning models only; ignored for Mistral). Empty = model default.
WHO ICD-API client id (https://icd.who.int/icdapi). Required only for ICD-11.
WHO ICD-API client secret. Required only for ICD-11.
WHO ICD-11 release.
WHO ICD-11 language (ISO 639-1).
BfArM ICD-10-GM ValueSet JSON URL.
Default classification system for requests without ?system=.
Deploy APIM facade in front of the Function App.
Publisher email for the APIM developer portal (required if deployApim=true).
Publisher organization name shown in the APIM developer portal.
Optional Key Vault secret URI for WHO_ICD_CLIENT_ID (BYOK).
Optional Key Vault secret URI for WHO_ICD_CLIENT_SECRET (BYOK).
Optional public HTTPS URL of a Function App .zip package for true 1-click code deploy.
Azure region for all resources. Recommended (Mistral + DataZoneStandard SKUs verified): germanywestcentral, switzerlandnorth, swedencentral.
Unique suffix for globally unique names.
Node.js runtime version (e.g. ~22).

LLM profile. aoai-eu = gpt-5.4 + gpt-4.1-mini (both DataZone). aoai-eu-cost = gpt-5.4 DataZone + gpt-5.4-mini Global. mistral-eu = Mistral-Large-3 only (DataZone). mistral-eu-cost = Mistral-Large-3 DataZone + mistral-small-2503 Global.
Reasoning effort for the reasoning role (AOAI reasoning models only; ignored for Mistral). low | medium | high. Empty = model default.
Optional Key Vault secret URI for WHO_ICD_CLIENT_ID (BYOK).
Optional Key Vault secret URI for WHO_ICD_CLIENT_SECRET (BYOK).
Public HTTPS URL of a function-app .zip package to mount via WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE. Empty = deploy code separately.

metadata.description: Resource location
Unique suffix for globally unique names (3-8 chars, lowercase)
Publisher email shown in the APIM developer portal
Publisher organization name
Function App default hostname (e.g. func-icd-xxx.azurewebsites.net)
Initial function key (optional). If empty, deploy.ps1 sets it post-deploy.

variables.openApiYaml:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: ICD Classifier
  version: '1.0'
  description: |
    Klassifiziert klinischen Freitext oder hochgeladene Dokumente (PDF/Bild) gegen ICD-Codes.
servers:
  - url: https://example.invalid
paths:
  /search:
    get:
      operationId: SearchCodes
      summary: ICD-Codes per Volltext suchen
      description: Liefert die besten Treffer zu einem Suchtext (Diagnosename, Stichwort, Code-Präfix).
      parameters:
        - in: query
          name: text
          required: true
          description: Suchtext, z.B. "Diabetes Typ 2" oder "I21".
          schema: { type: string }
        - in: query
          name: limit
          required: false
          description: Maximale Trefferanzahl (1-50, Default 10).
          schema: { type: integer, minimum: 1, maximum: 50, default: 10 }
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Suchergebnisse
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/SearchResponse' }
        '400': { $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest' }
        '401': { $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized' }

  /classify:
    post:
      operationId: Classify
      summary: Freitext oder Dokument klassifizieren
      description: |
        Genau eines der folgenden Felder im Body angeben:
        * `text` — Freitext zur Klassifikation (Arztbrief, Befund, Diagnoseliste).
        * `file` + `fileContentType` — Dokument als Base64 (PDF, PNG, JPG, TIFF, BMP).
        Liefert strukturierte Codes mit Display, Confidence, Rolle (Hauptdiagnose/Komorbidität/…), Seite und Verifizierungs-Flag.
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ClassifyRequest' }
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Klassifikationsergebnis
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ClassifyResponse' }
        '400': { $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest' }
        '401': { $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized' }

components:
  securitySchemes:
    apiKey:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key
  responses:
    BadRequest:
      description: Ungültiger Request
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error' }
    Unauthorized:
      description: Fehlender oder ungültiger Subscription Key
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error' }
  schemas:
    Error:
      type: object
      properties:
        error: { type: string }
        message: { type: string }

    SearchResult:
      type: object
      properties:
        code: { type: string, example: 'E11.20' }
        display: { type: string, example: 'Diabetes mellitus, Typ 2: Mit Nierenkomplikationen' }
        score: { type: number, format: float }
      required: [code, display]

    SearchResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        input: { type: string }
        count: { type: integer }
        results:
          type: array
          items: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/SearchResult' }
        codeSystem: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/CodeSystemInfo' }

    ClassifyRequest:
      type: object
      description: Entweder `text` ODER (`file` und `fileContentType`) angeben.
      properties:
        text:
          type: string
          description: Freitext zur Klassifikation.
          example: 'Diabetes mellitus Typ 2 mit Nephropathie, Arterielle Hypertonie Grad 2.'
        file:
          type: string
          format: byte
          description: Dateiinhalt als Base64 (PDF/Bild). Nur wenn kein `text` angegeben ist.
        fileContentType:
          type: string
          description: MIME-Type der Datei, z.B. "application/pdf", "image/png".
          example: application/pdf
        languageHint:
          type: string
          default: de
          description: Sprach-Hinweis (Default "de").

    DocumentCode:
      type: object
      properties:
        code: { type: string, example: 'I10.00' }
        display: { type: string }
        confidence:
          type: number
          format: float
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 1
        role:
          type: string
          description: primary / secondary / comorbidity / finding
        pages:
          type: array
          items: { type: integer }
        verified: { type: boolean }
        verificationMethod: { type: string }

    PageClassification:
      type: object
      properties:
        page: { type: integer }
        codes:
          type: array
          items: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/DocumentCode' }

    CodeSystemInfo:
      type: object
      properties:
        system: { type: string, example: icd11 }
        title: { type: string }
        publisher: { type: string }
        version: { type: string }
        release: { type: string }

    ClassifyResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        system: { type: string, example: icd11 }
        pageCount: { type: integer }
        documentCodes:
          type: array
          description: Über alle Seiten aggregierte, deduplizierte Codes.
          items: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/DocumentCode' }
        classifications:
          type: array
          description: Pro-Seiten-Klassifikation.
          items: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageClassification' }
        extractedTerms:
          type: array
          items: { type: string }
        codeSystem: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/CodeSystemInfo' }

security:
  - apiKey: []

properties.description: WHO ICD-11 MMS — Suche und Dokumentenklassifikation (deutsch).
